response.original_title: ザ ワールド オヴ  ハナエ モリ
response.overview: Short promotional film jointly directed by graphic designer and art director Ikko Tanaka, photographer Ikko Nara-hara, and cinematographer Tohichiro Narushima, produced as an introduction to costume designer Hanae Mori’s work and creative background for the 1969 Fortnight international showcase hosted by Neiman Marcus.
response.title: The World of Hanae Mori
